meta.name: Systems Theory
meta.description: Systems design concepts, not just informational but any system of flow.
invariants: System boundaries and component relationships MUST be explicitly defined and consistently enforced.
All system flows, transformations, and their causal linkages MUST be auditable and traceable.
System state, including emergent properties and side effects, MUST be inspectable, attributable, and reconstructible.
A system's intended purpose, scope, and functional objectives MUST be explicitly declared.
Feedback loops, control mechanisms, and adaptation strategies MUST be explicit, observable, and modifiable.
System resource dependencies, allocations, and consumption MUST be explicit and auditable.

symbols.name: Architecture Refactor Debugging Frustration
symbols.role: Pattern diagnosing friction during architecture refactors.

facets.commit: diagnostic log, architectural audit, developer support trigger

symbols.failure_mode: Untraceable error propagation leading to complete system paralysis and severe developer burnout/attrition.

symbols.name: Risk: Irreversible Deployment (High-Level Users)
symbols.role: Risk pattern for irreversible deployment.
symbols.failure_mode: Entrenchment of insecure/buggy code, erosion of trust in IT governance.

symbols.name: Action: Formal Policy Reinforcement (VP & Dept Head)
symbols.role: Action pattern for policy reinforcement.
symbols.failure_mode: Continued policy violations, lack of buy-in from other departments, or perceived organizational weakness.

symbols.name: Failure Mode: Security Department as Cost Center (Risk of Trimming)
symbols.role: Failure mode where security is seen as a cost center.
symbols.failure_mode: Reduced funding, diminished influence, potential reduction in workforce.

symbols.name: Pattern: Suboptimization
symbols.role: Identifies failure due to optimizing parts at the expense of the whole.
symbols.failure_mode: Local improvement degrades global performance.

symbols.name: Method: Shorten Delay
symbols.role: Reduces information or material delays to improve stability.
symbols.failure_mode: Oscillations continue.

symbols.name: Method: Anti-Fragility Induction
symbols.role: Induces structural strengthening via controlled stressors.
symbols.failure_mode: Missed strengthening opportunity.

symbols.name: Method: Add Buffer
symbols.role: Adds buffers or stocks to absorb systemic volatility.
symbols.failure_mode: Buffer becomes new delay source.

symbols.name: Concept: Fusion Capital Bifurcation
symbols.role: The trend where capital consolidates around perceived winners (CFS, Helion) while others (General Fusion) face liquidity crises and layoffs.
activation_conditions: When analyzing the financial health of the private fusion sector.
symbols.failure_mode: Collapse of mid-tier firms damages broader investor confidence.

symbols.name: The Systems Thinker
symbols.role: Persona for systems thinking, utilizing archetypes and dynamics to diagnose complexity.
symbols.failure_mode: Analysis becomes too abstract and detached from the specific details of the problem.

symbols.name: The Cyberneticist
symbols.role: Persona for cybernetics, control systems, and feedback analysis.
symbols.failure_mode: Focuses on control mechanisms to the exclusion of human and adaptive factors.

symbols.name: Archetype: Success to the Successful
symbols.role: Identifies loops where winners receive more resources, starving competition.
symbols.failure_mode: Fragile monopoly; loss of diversity.

symbols.name: Archetype: Accidental Adversaries
symbols.role: Diagnoses cases where well-intentioned local improvements create negative externalities for partners.
symbols.failure_mode: Systemic sabotage masked as local improvement.

symbols.name: Archetype: Shifting the Burden
symbols.role: Identifies the transition from fundamental problem-solving to symptomatic addiction.
symbols.failure_mode: Systemic addiction to external fixes; loss of capability.

symbols.name: Archetype: Limits to Growth
symbols.role: Identifies the limiting factors that eventually slow down reinforcing growth engines.
symbols.failure_mode: Overshoot and collapse due to ignored limits.

symbols.name: Archetype: Fixes that Fail
symbols.role: Diagnoses solutions that provide short-term relief but exacerbate the problem in the long term.
symbols.failure_mode: The solution becomes the primary driver of the problem.

symbols.name: Archetype: Eroding Goals
symbols.role: Identifies the pattern of lowering goals to match current performance.
symbols.failure_mode: Long-term decline in performance due to lowered standards.

symbols.name: Archetype: Escalation
symbols.role: Identifies patterns of mutually destructive escalation.
symbols.failure_mode: Arms race spirals out of control.

symbols.name: Pattern: Reinforcing Loop
symbols.role: Identifies self-reinforcing feedback loops.
symbols.failure_mode: Unchecked growth or collapse.

symbols.name: Pattern: Balancing Loop
symbols.role: Identifies self-correcting or goal-seeking feedback loops.
symbols.failure_mode: System becomes overly rigid or fails to adapt.

symbols.name: Pattern: System Delay
symbols.role: Identifies delays in feedback loops that cause oscillation.
symbols.failure_mode: Delay causes instability and overshoot.

symbols.name: Pattern: Homeostasis
symbols.role: Identifies mechanisms that maintain system stability.
symbols.failure_mode: System locked in suboptimal state (stagnation).

symbols.name: Pattern: Policy Resistance
symbols.role: Identifies when a system resists external intervention via internal compensation.
symbols.failure_mode: System compensates for policy, nullifying effect.

symbols.name: Method: Observer Inclusion
symbols.role: Explicitly includes the observer in the system model.
symbols.failure_mode: Observer effect ignored.

symbols.name: Lattice: Systems Archetypes
symbols.role: Foundational lattice binding core systems thinking archetypes into a unified diagnostic structure.
activation_conditions: Pattern matching against known failure modes
symbols.failure_mode: Fragmentation of archetypal understanding.

symbols.name: Lattice: System Dynamics
symbols.role: Aggregates the fundamental physics of systems: feedback loops, delays, and homeostasis.
symbols.failure_mode: Misidentification of loop polarity or delay causalities.

symbols.name: Lattice: Feedback Analysis
symbols.role: Analyzes feedback loops and polarity dominance.
symbols.failure_mode: Failed loop identification.

symbols.name: Lattice: Meta-System Reflection
symbols.role: Governs the reflective analysis of the system-of-systems, including the observer.
symbols.failure_mode: Blind spots due to lack of reflection.

symbols.name: Pattern: Requisite Variety Deficit
symbols.role: Identifies when a control system lacks the complexity to manage its environment.
activation_conditions: Loss of control due to complexity.
symbols.failure_mode: Controller overwhelmed by environment complexity.

symbols.name: Pattern: Path Dependency
symbols.role: Identifies when historical choices constrain future options.
symbols.failure_mode: Suboptimal paths reinforced by history.

symbols.name: Pattern: Degenerative Adaptation
symbols.role: Identifies adaptations that mask or sustain systemic dysfunction.
symbols.failure_mode: Adaptations sustain dysfunction.

symbols.name: Method: Goal Alignment
symbols.role: Unifies subsystem goals under a superordinate purpose.
symbols.failure_mode: Superordinate goal rejected.

symbols.name: Method: Leverage Point Identification
symbols.role: Identifies high-leverage points for system intervention.
symbols.failure_mode: Low-leverage intervention.

symbols.name: Method: Leverage Visibility
symbols.role: Enhances visibility of hidden leverage points.
symbols.failure_mode: Inability to act.

symbols.name: Lattice: Causal Modeling
symbols.role: Governs the process of causal loop modeling and variable mapping.
symbols.failure_mode: Oversimplified model.

symbols.name: Root Reclaim Pattern (Systems Analogue)
symbols.role: Pattern for systemic root reclaim.

facets.function: Model of systemic self-regeneration after integrity collapse

symbols.failure_mode: Feedback channels collapse without regeneration → system drifts irreversibly
